aubergine.$description: Aubergine — Primary brand — navigation borders, nav text, heading text, card surfaces in dark sections, icon strokes. The structural spine of the entire system

ghost-lavender.$description: Ghost Lavender — Primary action — filled CTA button background, violet glow shadow on buttons. The light-on-light button that only reveals its presence through a soft 4px halo

periwinkle.$description: Periwinkle — Secondary action — brighter lavender for secondary CTAs, decorative fills, icon accents. Adds saturation to the pale-violet world

cornflower-pop.$description: Cornflower Pop — Accent button — occasional vivid blue button for emphasis or differentiation. Use sparingly as a high-energy interruption

buttercream.$description: Buttercream — Accent button — pale yellow button fill for variety in multi-action contexts. Pastel punctuation in the candy palette

blush-mist.$description: Blush Mist — Accent button — near-gray pink button for warmth and tonal range. The softest of the pastel set

mint-signal.$description: Mint Signal — Success badge — vivid green for status indicators, positive confirmations, live signals

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Canvas — page background, card surfaces, button borders, text on dark backgrounds. Near-white with the faintest cool tint

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Body text, heading text on light backgrounds, button borders, card borders. The near-black ink for all foreground content

fog.$description: Fog — Muted text, icon strokes, secondary nav borders. The quiet gray for non-emphasized elements

ash.$description: Ash — Button background, subtle surface fill. The neutral pale surface beneath lavender hero panels

bone.$description: Bone — Surface background — light section panels, button fills. The warmest of the near-white neutrals

phantom.$description: Custom typeface used for everything. Weight 350 is the default body and display weight — unconventional lightness creates an airy, anti-bold personality. Weight 400 reserved for body copy that needs slightly more presence. Sizes scale dramatically from 13px caption to 96px display. Tight -0.025em letter-spacing at all sizes creates compressed, high-density headlines. Line-height collapses to 1.0-1.1 at display sizes for sculptural headline forms.

paper-white.$description: Surface level 1: Base canvas — the default page background, the lightest possible near-white

bone.$description: Surface level 2: Light section panels — subtle warm shift for content blocks on white

ash.$description: Surface level 3: Neutral button surface — used for secondary buttons and quiet containers

ghost-lavender.$description: Surface level 4: Primary CTA surface — lavender fill with violet halo for the system's main action

aubergine.$description: Surface level 5: Dark section background — the deep-violet surface for inverted hero panels
